untranslatable_reason: Island Bottom pattern requires precise identification of isolated price action (island) separated by gaps on both sides, and throwback confirmation to the island formation. These multi-bar structural requirements cannot be fully captured by point-in-time indicator values alone. The conditions above approximate entry signals (gap down, oversold, gap up, breakout above trend), but do not capture the throwback-to-island confirmation mechanics or the exact geometric gap relationships that define the pattern.
